---
title: "Week 13"
subtitle: "Globalization and Inequality"
---

::: callout-important
Project Assignment 2 is due on Friday, April 17 at 11:59 p.m.
:::

## Readings

📖 Autor, Dorn and Hanson, ["The China Shock"](https://www.annualreviews.org/doi/full/10.1146/annurev-economics-080315-015041)

📖 Joseph Stiglitz, [*People, Power, and Profits*](https://www.amazon.com/gp/product/B07P92PDLF/ref=dbs_a_def_rwt_bibl_vppi_i2)*, Chapter 3*

## Slides

🖥️ [Globalization](/slides/lecture-12.1.html)

🖥️ [Inequality](/slides/lecture-12.3.html)

## Assignments

✍️ [Project Assignment 2: Project Proposal](/project/project-assignment-2.html)

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
